project.name: JIT Runner
project.summary: Reusable GitHub Actions runner image with Sylphx-required base tools and GHCR publishing workflow.
goals: Provide a reproducible GitHub Actions runner image with Sylphx-required base tools.
Publish traceable GHCR image tags from main.
Keep the image contract small enough that repository-specific CI behavior stays in the consuming repositories or central reusable workflows.
nonGoals: Own GitHub Actions runner registration, autoscaling, queueing, credentials, or repository-specific CI policy.
Own application build behavior for consumers of the runner image.
Own enterprise doctrine, manifest schema, rollout planning, or org rulesets.

owns.name: runner-image
owns.description: Dockerfile, selected base runner image, installed Sylphx tools, and environment defaults for the reusable runner image.

owns.name: runner-image-publication
owns.description: GHCR image naming, push workflow, and published tags for the jit-runner image.

doesNotOwn: GitHub Actions runner registration, autoscaling, queue assignment, secrets, credentials, or fleet lifecycle management.
Repository-specific CI jobs, application build behavior, deploy policy, or status context requirements.
Enterprise doctrine, project manifest schema, org rulesets, rollout issue reconciliation, or shared delivery policy.

allowedDependencies.surface: project manifest schema, standards, and rollout audit

forbiddenCouplings: Do not put repository-specific build or deploy behavior into the shared runner image.
Do not require consumers to depend on undocumented Dockerfile internals instead of published image tags or digests.
Do not treat source revert as sufficient recovery after image publication; consumers must be able to roll back to a previous digest.
Do not publish enterprise process policy from this repository instead of SylphxAI/doctrine.

delivery.deployPath: On main, .github/workflows/build.yml builds and pushes ghcr.io/sylphxai/jit-runner tags latest and sha-<short-sha>.
delivery.productionProof: Durable GHCR digest readback and a runner smoke check are not yet declared.

gaps.description: Add a README that documents the image contract, included tools, supported tags, and consumer expectations.
Add pull-request validation for Dockerfile lint, image build, dependency provenance, and runner smoke checks.
Document GHCR digest readback, consumer smoke proof, and rollback-by-digest expectations for published images.
